meta.notes:
DUAL QUOTE REFERENCE: NCS quote number = Q23114. Customer (Crafted Interiors) internal reference = Q2026-021. PDF title is 'Quote - Q23114 - Q2026-021 Everton Hills'. This surfaces the V2 backlog item 'client external reference field on quote' — V2 currently has only one quote-number field; multi-stakeholder builds (NCS reference + customer reference) need both visible. Schema not extended this session; observation logged in session log.

=== TWO-OPTION QUOTE — V3 CONCEPT GAP ===

Q23114 PDF presents TWO mutually exclusive options for the SAME kitchen layout:
  Option 1: Alpha Surfaces Collection 1 — Excl GST $4,405.95, GST $440.60, Incl GST $4,846.54.
  Option 2: Alpha Surfaces Collection 2 — Excl GST $4,757.95, GST $475.80, Incl GST $5,233.74.
There is NO grand subtotal in the PDF — options are choose-one.

V3-concept gap: 'option pricing on a quote'. V2 currently models a quote as a single priced configuration. NCS issues option-quotes where customer chooses one. Lossy translation strategy: model in V2 as TWO separate quotes (Q23114-Opt1 and Q23114-Opt2), then mark the chosen one as accepted. Confirm with Jay.

This fixture captures Option 1 (Collection 1) as the canonical single-config build target. Option 2 should produce a sibling fixture once option modelling is decided.

=== BUILD-SPEC FROM DRAWING ===

Drawing annotations (TOPS.pdf):
  COLOUR — ALPHA SURFACES COLLECTION 1 OPTION FOR 2 (so Collection 1 is the base preference)
  THICKNESS — 20mm
  CUT OUTS — 1× UM SINK, 1× CT (cooktop)
  EDGES — Pencil round (different from Q23113's Standard Arris)

Kitchen layout — U-shape, 3 pieces:
  Top arm horizontal piece: 2390 × 600 × 20mm
  Left arm vertical piece: 2150 × 600 × 20mm
  Right arm vertical piece: 2450 × 900 × 20mm with a 450mm Radius End at the bottom and a Post Cutout at the rounded end.
  Outer envelope dimensions on drawing: 2990 wide × 2150 tall (left arm) × 2450 tall (right arm) × 600 deep top arm × 900 deep right arm. The 2390 horizontal length presumably belongs to the top piece, with 600mm and 900mm corner overlap belonging to side arms (1700-vs-2700 corner-ownership convention as in Q23112).

  Cutouts:
    1× Undermount Sink ($300 per Beau)
    1× Cooktop ($65 standard)
    1× Post Cutout (small notch at radius end — AMBIGUOUS, treated as $65 standard)
  Edge features:
    1× 450mm Radius End on the right arm — curved/rounded end. Not a cutout. Curved edge profile. NOT in Beau's rate sheet at a rate; the perimeter contribution from the rounded semicircle (π × 450 ≈ 1414mm) is included in cutting + polishing Lm but the curved-fab labour premium is not modelled.

Material: Option 1 = Alpha Surfaces Collection 1. Drawing says 'Pencil round' edge profile on all seen edges.

Total area:
  2150 × 600 = 1.290 m²
  2390 × 600 = 1.434 m²
  2450 × 900 = 2.205 m² (rough; actual radius end reduces this slightly)
  Total ≈ 4.929 m²

=== V3-CONCEPT GAPS SURFACED ===
  1. Option pricing on a quote (NCS issues quotes with multiple stone-collection options for the same geometry).
  2. Dual quote reference (NCS number + customer internal reference).
  3. Curved/radius end edge profile — V2 edge model handles straight edges; curved-end fabrication is a separate skill not parametrically modelled.
  4. Post cutout — small structural notch around a building post. Cutout taxonomy may need a 'structural notch' class.

=== AMBIGUOUS ITEMS ===
  - Post cutout rate: standard or specialty?
  - 450mm radius end — labour premium not in Beau's rate sheet.
  - Pencil round edge profile vs Standard Arris — V2 has both ARRIS_EDGE_ID and MITERED_EDGE_ID; pencil round is yet another profile (small radius). Maps to V2 if a 'PENCIL_ROUND' edge profile exists or is added.
  - Per-piece seen-edge length: drawing has red 'x' marks indicating join/edge transitions but per-edge polish length not machine-extractable.

=== ncsImpliedBreakdown DERIVATION (Option 1, Collection 1) ===

Materials (Collection 1 ~ Jewel-tier $537/slab Customer Price):
  3 pieces (2150×600, 2390×600, 2450×900) totalling 4.93 m². Slab 5.2164 m².
  Pack analysis: 2450×900 + 2390×600 fit on Slab 1 (2450 fits in 3220; combined 900+600 = 1500 < 1620 height). 2150×600 needs Slab 2 (only 120mm strip remains on Slab 1).
  2 slabs × $537 = $1,074.00.
  Provenance: 'Alpha Surfaces catalog Mar26 — Option 1 = Collection 1, $537/slab Customer Price (representative: Jewel/Crystal/Brilliance/Graphite/Bondi/Fraser); 2 slabs needed for 3-piece U-shape'.

  Note: Quote PDF says 'Alpha Surfaces Collection 1' without naming the specific colour. Collection 1 is a tier (6 colours all priced identically at $537/slab Customer Price). The fixture captures the tier-level price; colour selection is a customer choice within the tier.

Cutting (Beau 20mm $17.50/Lm — perimeters):
  2150 × 600: 5.5 Lm
  2390 × 600: 5.98 Lm
  2450 × 900: 6.7 Lm rectangular; with 450R radius end perimeter is 6.31 Lm (replacing 1800mm rectangular end with 1414mm semicircle). Use 6.31 Lm.
  Total: 5.5 + 5.98 + 6.31 = 17.79 Lm.
  17.79 × $17.50 = $311.33.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — 20mm cut $17.50/Lm; perimeter; right arm radius-end perimeter computed via π×R'.

Polishing (Beau 20mm $45/Lm — APPROXIMATE seen edges):
  Estimating front-edge + 1 short end seen per piece (kitchen U-shape convention):
    2150 × 600 (left arm): front 2150 + bottom end 600 = 2.75 Lm
    2390 × 600 (top arm): bottom 2390 = 2.39 Lm (both side ends butt-join to side arms)
    2450 × 900 (right arm): front 2450 + radius semicircle 1.414 Lm = 3.864 Lm
  Total: 2.75 + 2.39 + 3.86 = 9.00 Lm.
  9.00 × $45.00 = $405.00.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — 20mm polish $45.00/Lm; APPROXIMATE seen-edge length per kitchen U-shape convention (front + open ends + radius perimeter)'.

Cutouts:
  1× Undermount sink $300 + 1× Cooktop $65 + 1× Post cutout $65 (AMBIGUOUS) = $430.00, 3 items.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27: undermount sink $300, standard cutout $65 each (cooktop, post cutout — post cutout AMBIGUOUS, treated as standard)'.

Installation:
  null. Note: 95 km Regional install likely costs more than a Local install; this is a substantial unmodelled component.
  Provenance: 'Not in Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — needs Jay'.

Templating:
  Distance Kunda Park HQ → Everton Hills, Brisbane ≈ 95 km. Regional zone (31-100 km). $150 + $2.00 × 95 = $340.00. Required=true.
  Provenance: 'V2 hardcoded TEMPLATING_RATE, distance approx via Google Maps; Regional zone (95 km within 100 km cap)'.

Delivery:
  95 km → Regional zone. $75 + $3.00 × 95 = $360.00.
  Provenance: 'V2 hardcoded DELIVERY_ZONES (Regional zone, 31-100 km), distance approx via Google Maps; if precise route exceeds 100 km switch to Remote ($100 + $3.50/km)'.

Sum of populated implied components (Option 1):
  1074.00 + 311.33 + 405.00 + 430.00 + 340.00 + 360.00 = $2,920.33
  NCS Option 1 Excl GST: $4,405.95
  Gap: $1,485.62 — installation labour at distance + radius-end fab premium + margin. Plausible for a 95 km Regional kitchen install.

  Cross-check Option 2: NCS diff vs Option 1 = $352.00 ex GST. Materials diff (Collection 2 - Collection 1) = ($689 - $537) × 2 slabs = $304. Plus margin uplift ~$48. Internally consistent.
